nasb.text: All of them are wielders of the sword, Expert in war; Each man has his sword at his side, Guarding against the terrors of the night.

esv.text: all of them wearing swords and expert in war, each with his sword at his thigh, against terror by night.

cnv.text: 個個手拿武器，能征慣戰； 各人腿上配有利劍，以防夜間的襲擊。

ccb.text: 他们个个骁勇善战，手持利剑， 腰配战刀，防备夜间的偷袭。
